citation: Wong, Anita M.-Y. 2023. Understanding Development and Disorder in Cantonese Using Language Sample Analysis. Routledge.
source_role: published structural description and exact example
exact_locator: chapter 4, printed p.50; PDF p.60, Instrumental SVC section
finding: Classifies 呢個用嚟切嘢 as an Instrumental SVC; says the instrument may be omitted or moved to subject position with 用嚟, followed by a verb specifying the action performed through use of the instrument.
limitation: Supports the surface and a competing instrumental-SVC analysis, not a unique intended-function node, exhaustive resource classes, or the parser exclusions.

citation: Cheung, Hung-nin Samuel. 2018. 緣自何來：早期粵語中「嚟」的來去踪跡. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 97(1):17–39.
exact_locator: PDF pp.3–4; article pp.20–21, section 5 and footnote 9
finding: Describes V1 + 嚟 + V2 as purposive and states 用來/用嚟 has become a disyllabic expression.
limitation: Does not establish the parser’s overt-resource subtype, no-user/no-modal/no-perfective boundaries, or productive lexical scope.

citation: Hong Kong Memory. 紅姑－沙埔村的四進竹筒屋.
exact_locator: final sentence of the descriptive paragraph: 另一邊用來儲物
finding: Contains an overt spatial part followed by 用來 and the storage predicate 儲物.
limitation: Supports this exact written spatial profile only; it is not a marked direct quotation and does not establish spoken naturalness or parser boundaries.

citation: Countryside Conservation Office. 細說村屋歷史.
exact_locator: quotation attributed to 屋主三民叔: 呢間屋用嚟擺嘢、養豬養牛，魚網農具都喺度
finding: Directly quotes an overt house resource with 用嚟 and coordinated use predicates. The same page also has 用嚟做咗閒屋, showing broader perfective actual-use material exists outside the narrow subtype.
limitation: The full quoted predicate is coordinated, while the frozen parser rejects or incompletely handles coordination. One quotation cannot establish unrestricted resource, predicate, or coordination productivity.

citation: Chor, Winnie Oi-Wan. 2018. Directional Particles in Cantonese. John Benjamins.
exact_locator: chapter 4 purpose extension discussion; example 啲錢我用嚟買晒嗰堆嘢
finding: Documents broader purposive 用嚟 with a separate overt user and a completed actual-use event.
limitation: Supports exclusion of the broader frame from the narrow parser subtype; it does not prove the narrow subtype productive.

citation: Matthews, Stephen. 2006. On Serial Verb Constructions in Cantonese. In Aikhenvald & Dixon (eds.), Serial Verb Constructions: A Cross-Linguistic Typology, 69–87. Oxford University Press.
finding: Publication identity, chapter title, venue, and pages were verified. Specific prior claims were not counted as reverified because the chapter full text was not independently reopened in this cycle.
